context7.description: Live documentation lookup — use with /docs command (resolve-library-id, query-docs).

playwright.description: Browser automation and E2E testing. Use to visually validate UI, fill forms, and run browser-level tests.

github.description: GitHub integration — read/write PRs, issues, and repos. Configure with /setup-github command.

filesystem.description: Sandboxed filesystem access for the current project directory. Useful for safe file operations.

postgres.description: Direct PostgreSQL access for schema introspection and query testing. Used by the database-specialist agent. Replace YOUR_DATABASE_URL_HERE with your connection string.

_settings.usage: Do NOT put this file in your project root. Copy these JSON blocks to your global ~/.claude.json file under the mcpServers property.

notes.postgres: Replace YOUR_DATABASE_URL_HERE with your actual connection string before enabling
